titleStmt.title: SII 15.50: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 50. (B.K. No. 54-A of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a beam of the Kāśīviśvanātha temple.

This is dated the [6th] regnal year of the king, Yuva, Māgha ba. amāvāsyā, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, corresponding to 1156 A.D., January 23, Monday, f.d.t. °35. The Uttārayaṇa-saṁkrānti, however, occurred on the 25th of the previous month.

It registers a gift of land made by Kāḷeyanāyaka, son of Mākēstara Mākimayyanāyaka to Mōnidēva for his bhikshā. The donee in turn gave it for feeding the ascetics who visited the temple of Kavatāḷa Chāvuṇḍēśvara at Lokkiguṇḍi. Kāḷeyanāyaka is described as the son, i.e., lay disciple, of Mōnidēva, who was the disciple of Sāmavēdidēva, the āchārya of the temple of Rāmēśvara of Huligeṟe.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This is engraved in continuation of No. 48 above.
div.p:
© mattaveraḍaṟunūṟakkaṁ bhūṣaṇamāgi¨rppa huligeṟeya śrīrāmēśvaradācā¨ryya¨rssā mavēdidēvara tapaḥprabhāvameṁteṁdaḍe . Annamanāvagaṁ toṟedu mūṟu dinaṁ rasava¨rjamappa bhikṣāṁnamadante pāraṇeyanalu niyamaṁgaḷiniṁtu mūṟumabdaṁ neṟe dēvakā¨ryyamane māḍidareṁdaḍe sadbrataprabhāvōnnati sāmavēdimunigallade mattuḷidaṁge tī¨rggumē © tatsipyarappa śrīmōnidēva
ra tapaḥprabhāvōnnatiyeṁteṁdaḍe . Aṟikeya mōhameṁba toḍaraṁ paḻidikkitu ka¨rmmameṁba hēraṟikeya kaṁbhavaṁmuṟidudiṁdriyava¨rggama�ṁba kaḷḷaraṁ taṟidudu kāmaneṁba harikārana nāvagadinda niggadiṁdiṟidudu mōnidēvamunipuṁgavaneṁba madāndhasiṁhara . Intu nega¨rtte vetta mōnidēvara maga mākēstara mākimayyana suputra kāḷeyanāyakanu vīradā vaṇnana kāḷpattiya sa[¨rvvabā]
dhāparihāramappa kariyara keṟeya haḍuvaṇa dāriyiṁ baḍagaṇa matta¨rkkeyyaṁ kālga¨rccāgi koṁḍu śrīmaccāḷukya taiḷōkyamalladēva 6 neya yuva saṁvatsara māgha bahuḷadamāva se sōmavāra muttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vyatipātadandu tamma paramā rādhyarappa śrīmōnidēvara pādaprakṣāḷanaṁ māḍi bhikṣegeṁdu koṭṭa keyyanavaruṁ śrīma llokkiguṁḍiya kavatāḷa cāvuṁḍēśvaradēvara divya śrīpādaṁgaḷaṁ tapōvriddharāgi palakāla manubhavi
suttami¨rppa tadāśramigaḷappabhyāgata tapōdhanarāhāradānakkeṁdu koṭṭarī dha¨rmmamā cā¨ryyaru tamma dha¨rmmamāgi svadha¨rmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvaru . sthiramāgintida nakkariṁ nilisidaṁgā rudralōkaṁ nirantaramakkuṁ kiḍipaṁge gaṁge gaye tī¨rtthaṁgaḷoḷā ma brāhmaṇa munipagōtrabrātamaṁ konda dustarapāpaṁ dorekoḷgumi¨rkkuṣuvanenduṁ vāravāṁbōdhiyoḷ © © ©
Digital edition of SII 15.50 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
